meta.notes: Finnish household electricity — average for "5,000 kWh–15,000 kWh" annual consumption, from Statistics Finland (Tilastokeskus), StatFin table 13rb. All-in 17.14 c/kWh = electric energy 5.94 + distribution 5.46 + taxes (electricity tax + VAT) 5.74. Licensed CC BY 4.0 — attribute Statistics Finland. A statistical average, not a shoppable plan. Period 2026M03.
